message:
chore(web): add touch polish and animations to sessions UI

- Add touch-manipulation and active states to links
- Add staggered fade-in animations to thread cards
- Add pulse-glow animation to active status badges
- Improve button shadows and hover effects
- Add chevron affordance to thread cards
- Increase checkbox size in SessionForm

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.5","title":"Web: operator palette + prompt builder UI","description":"# Goal
Make Brenner moves tangible in the UI:
- show operator palette with definitions + quotes
- let user apply operators to a question
- generate role-specific prompt bundles

This is how we turn the distillations into an executable interface.

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.5","title":"EPIC: CLI/Binary (brenner)","description":"# Goal
Turn `brenner.ts` into a **single executable** that makes Brenner Bot usable from the terminal:
- corpus-first workflows (search/read/excerpt)
- session workflows (compose → send → fetch → compile → publish)
- Agent Mail tooling (agents/inbox/thread/ack)
- optional memory augmentation via `cass-memory (cm)`

Constraint: Bun-only, and should compile to a single executable.

---

# How this fits the no-API architecture
The CLI is the *operator’s control surface* for a cockpit-first system:
- It coordinates **messages** (Agent Mail threads), not model inference.
- It can be used alongside `ntm` to run Codex/Claude/Gemini CLIs in parallel.

Recommended convention:
- For engineering work, use the Beads ID as the Agent Mail `thread_id`.
","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:21:57.443351805-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:02:45.620676059-05:00","labels":["bun","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:21:57.44427355-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.1","title":"CLI: command surface + config","description":"# Goal
Make the CLI a coherent tool (not a pile of subcommands):
- consistent command naming
- readable `--help`
- config defaults (project key, Agent Mail URL, preferred templates)

Constraint: Bun-only, and should compile to a single executable.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:26:13.371941598-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T13:15:17.909968954-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T13:15:17.909968954-05:00","close_reason":"All P1 children complete","labels":["cli","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:26:13.393052988-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.1.1","title":"Define CLI command map + config precedence","description":"Define the CLI surface area:
- commands and subcommands
- required flags
- config precedence (flags > env > config file > defaults)

Done when: we have a stable contract for users.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:26:42.0548921-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T22:00:00.994753962-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T22:00:00.994753962-05:00","close_reason":"Completed: documented CLI command map + config precedence; aligned examples with current CLI","labels":["cli","design"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.1.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:26:42.074686241-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
